user.title: Add Android Media Player
user.description: Enter the primary IP address and port of your Android device running the Media Player app. You can optionally provide a secondary IP address for VPN/WireGuard failover. The device name will be automatically retrieved from the tablet.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device using the configured host(s). Please check the addresses and port.

init.title: Android Media Player options
init.description: Update the primary/secondary host and port used to connect to your Android device.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device using the configured host(s). Please check the addresses and port.
